settings.heading: Confirm device and workflow fit
settings.copy: Confirm product fit by platform, device type, display path, and the setup you are building before setup begins.
settings.support_note: Compatibility is where buying confidence and setup confidence meet. Confirm the right fit first, then open manuals, downloads, or support only if you still need more detail.

settings.heading: Compatibility guidance for real devices and workflows
settings.copy: Use compatibility guidance to buy with more confidence and reduce guesswork before setup begins.
settings.source_note: Check the device, platform, or workflow that matches your setup first. Open manuals, downloads, or support only if one detail still needs a closer look.

settings.heading: Keep the right follow-up nearby
settings.copy: Open setup files, guides, or direct support without losing sight of the product you are checking.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Continue to drivers or utilities tied to supported products.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Continue to setup guides or documentation tied to supported products.

settings.title: Contact support
settings.copy: Contact support when compatibility depends on a more specific deployment question.

settings.heading: Need help after fit is confirmed?
settings.copy: If compatibility is clear but setup still is not, open manuals first, then contact support only if the install still needs help.
